name: Petro Stopping Center Milan (Petro #313)
description: Full-service Petro (TravelCenters of America) truck stop at I-40 Exit 79 in Milan, next to Grants, with an Iron Skillet restaurant, service bays and a CAT scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #257
description: Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 79 serving the Grants/Milan area, with diesel fueling lanes, showers, a CAT scale and quick-service food.

name: Love's Travel Stop #215
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 16 on the west side of Gallup, offering diesel, showers, food and a convenience store.

name: TA Gallup (TravelCenters of America #008)
description: TravelCenters of America truck stop at I-40 Exit 16 in Gallup with a Country Pride restaurant, multiple showers, truck service bays and laundry.

name: Pilot / Flying J Travel Center #305
description: Large Pilot/Flying J travel center at I-40 Exit 39 (Giant Crossing) between Thoreau and Gallup, with hundreds of truck parking spaces, showers and restaurant/deli.

name: Gallup Port of Entry / Weigh Station
description: New Mexico DOT port of entry and truck weigh station on I-40 west of Gallup (near mile marker 12), where commercial vehicles are screened and PrePass is available.

name: Speedway Towing LLC
description: Gallup-based 24/7 heavy-duty towing, recovery and mobile roadside company serving I-40 trucks, offering tire changes, DOT inspections and truck/trailer repairs.
